# Seoul BD Dental Clinic (서울비디치과)
> Comprehensive dental care center in Cheonan, South Korea. 365 days open, 15 dentists from Seoul National University, specializing in implants, Invisalign, and aesthetic dentistry.

## About
Seoul BD Dental Clinic (서울비디치과) is a large-scale dental center located in Buldang-dong, Cheonan, Chungnam, South Korea. Founded by Dr. Moon Seok-Jun (문석준), the clinic operates from a 400-pyeong (1,320 m²) 5-story building with 6 independent surgical suites, 2 recovery rooms, and an air-shower infection control system equivalent to Seoul National University Dental Hospital standards.

- **Name**: 서울비디치과 (Seoul BD Dental Clinic)
- **Address**: 충남 천안시 서북구 불당34길 14, 1~5층
- **Phone**: 041-415-2892
- **Website**: https://bdbddc.com
- **Hours**: Mon-Fri 09:30-20:00, Sat 09:00-17:00, Sun 09:00-17:00, Holidays 09:00-13:00 (365 days)

## Key Features
- 15 dentists from Seoul National University dental school
- 6 dedicated implant surgical rooms
- 3 pediatric dentistry specialists
- Large-scale Invisalign orthodontic center
- Glownate (laminate veneer) aesthetic treatment
- Air-shower infection control system
- 365-day operation including weekends and holidays
- Evening hours until 20:00 on weekdays

## Major Services

### Implant Center (임플란트센터)
Full-service implant treatment including navigation-guided implants, sleep sedation implants, full-mouth rehabilitation, bone grafting, and sinus lifts. 6 dedicated surgical rooms.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant

### Invisalign Orthodontic Center (인비절라인 교정센터)
Certified Invisalign provider offering clear aligner orthodontic treatment for adults and teens.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign

### Glownate Aesthetic Center (글로우네이트 심미센터)
Proprietary aesthetic dental treatment (laminate/veneer) for smile design and cosmetic enhancement.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/glownate

### Pediatric Dentistry Center (소아치과센터)
Specialized pediatric dental care with 3 board-certified pediatric dentists. Nitrous oxide sedation and sleep dentistry for children.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/pediatric

### General & Restorative Treatments
- Cavity treatment: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/cavity
- Crown: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/crown
- Root canal: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/root-canal
- Whitening: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/whitening
- Scaling: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/scaling
- Wisdom tooth extraction: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/wisdom-tooth
- Gum surgery: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/gum-surgery
- All treatments: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/

## Medical Team
15 dentists led by Representative Director Dr. Moon Seok-Jun (문석준 대표원장), a graduate of Seoul National University College of Dentistry and SNU Graduate School (Master's). Board-certified in Integrated Dentistry.
- Full team: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/
- Dr. Moon Seok-Jun: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/moon

## Service Areas
The clinic serves patients from across the Chungnam/Chungbuk/Daejeon metropolitan area:
Cheonan (천안), Asan (아산), Sejong (세종), Daejeon (대전), Cheongju (청주), Pyeongtaek (평택), Anseong (안성), Chungju (충주), and 20+ additional regions.
- Area pages: https://bdbddc.com/area/cheonan, https://bdbddc.com/area/asan, https://bdbddc.com/area/sejong, etc.

## Patient Resources
- Online reservation: https://bdbddc.com/reservation
- Pricing guide: https://bdbddc.com/pricing

- Blog: https://bdbddc.com/blog/
- Video content: https://bdbddc.com/video/
- Before/After cases: https://bdbddc.com/cases/gallery
- Dental Encyclopedia (187 terms): https://bdbddc.com/encyclopedia/

## Philosophy
"필요한 진료를 받지 못하는 사람이 없도록 하자" (No one should miss the dental care they need)
BD stands for "Beyond Dentistry" — going beyond simple dental treatment to improve overall oral health and quality of life. The clinic promises transparent pricing, no unnecessary treatments, and patient-first care.
